name: D. Jagadeesan
summary: AI Analyst at Deloitte with hands-on experience building and deploying AI-powered applications on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). Pursuing M.Tech in Artificial Intelligence at IIT Jodhpur. Strong practical expertise in Generative AI solutions including RAG-based document Q&A systems using LangChain and Ollama. AWS Certified Solutions Architect Associate. Seeking Generative AI roles to drive real enterprise impact.

experience.title: Analyst
bullets: AI Analyst building and deploying AI-powered applications on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP).
Develop Generative AI solutions including RAG-based document Q&A systems using LangChain and Ollama.
Awarded Crown of Excellence for outstanding performance and innovation.

projects.title: RAG Chatbot - Local Document Intelligence System
projects.description: Built an end-to-end RAG pipeline for PDF/DOCX Q&A with fully local execution using LangChain, Ollama, ChromaDB, and Streamlit.
bullets: Implemented semantic chunking with RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter and nomic-embed-text embeddings.
Integrated deepseek-r1:8b as local LLM with zero external API dependency for data privacy.
Optimized retrieval with semantic similarity search and context-aware prompting.

projects.title: Medical Insurance Cost Prediction
projects.description: Random Forest model to predict healthcare charges with GridSearchCV optimization.
bullets: Built preprocessing pipeline with OneHotEncoder and StandardScaler.
Performed data quality checks for missing values, duplicates, and skewness on Kaggle dataset.

education.degree: PGD and M.Tech in Artificial Intelligence

education.institution: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology, Coimbatore

awards: Top 5, Kaggle Open-Source Competition - Earthquake Intensity Prediction Model
